screen.sre.skins.knife.default.name: Default
screen.sre.skins.knife.default.desc: This is the original knife skin without inscription or decoration, born from the sea of data untouched by dust; the so-called default appearance is the first true face that needs no words.
screen.sre.skins.bat.astral_defense.name: Astral Defense
screen.sre.skins.bat.astral_defense.desc: A glimmer of defensive light from the depths of the stars, shielding its holder from the invasion of darkness.
screen.sre.skins.knife.balisong.name: Balisong
screen.sre.skins.knife.balisong.desc: The graceful opening and closing like a butterfly's dance, every movement a display of artistry.
screen.sre.skins.knife.bear_claw.name: Bear Claw
screen.sre.skins.knife.bear_claw.desc: The sharp claw of a northern bear, every scratch etched with the power of the wild.
screen.sre.skins.knife.black_blade.name: Black Blade
screen.sre.skins.knife.black_blade.desc: A blade of abyssal darkness, arriving silently like the night.
screen.sre.skins.knife.blade_of_blood_re: A blade stained with blood, each drop telling a story of the battlefield.
screen.sre.skins.knife.blue_curved_knife: A crescent-shaped blue blade, elegant yet lethally dangerous.
screen.sre.skins.knife.blue_knife.name: Blue Knife
screen.sre.skins.knife.blue_knife.desc: A pure blue blade, like crystallized deep-sea water.
screen.sre.skins.knife.broken_bottle.des: The remnants of a drunken brawl, the sharp glass shards the final weapon.
screen.sre.skins.knife.carrot_knife.name: Carrot Knife
screen.sre.skins.knife.carrot_knife.desc: Looks like a carrot, but it won't be so cute when cutting through enemies.
screen.sre.skins.knife.cat_paw.name: Cat Paw
screen.sre.skins.knife.cat_paw.desc: A cat's paw pad, soft yet capable of tearing through steel.
screen.sre.skins.knife.chicken_sword.des: This knife is shaped like a chicken and clucks when attacking.
screen.sre.skins.knife.ceremonial.name: Ceremonial Dagger
screen.sre.skins.knife.ceremonial.desc: A silver blade for cutting ceremonial ribbons, born in the gap between blessings and silence—the moment its tip touches, even time's sash is severed.
screen.sre.skins.knife.chopper.name: Chopper
screen.sre.skins.knife.chopper.desc: A trusty kitchen helper, equally sharp for cutting meat and vegetables.
screen.sre.skins.knife.colorful_folding_: A vibrant folding knife, each color its own unique charm.
screen.sre.skins.knife.crystalline.name: Crystalline Blade
screen.sre.skins.knife.crystalline.desc: A crystal-clear blade, as if reflecting the reflections of everything in the world.
screen.sre.skins.knife.cultist.name: Cultist Dagger
screen.sre.skins.knife.cultist.desc: A dagger tainted by dark power, exuding an eerie aura.
screen.sre.skins.knife.cutter_knife.name: Cutter Knife
screen.sre.skins.knife.cutter_knife.desc: A blade designed for cutting, precise and efficient.
screen.sre.skins.knife.folly_stick.name: Folly Stick
screen.sre.skins.knife.folly_stick.desc: An April Fools' gift, seemingly absurd yet hiding sharpness.
screen.sre.skins.knife.glass.name: Glass Shard
screen.sre.skins.knife.glass.desc: Fragile glass, yet capable of cutting through the hardest surfaces.
screen.sre.skins.knife.golden_shear.name: Golden Shears
screen.sre.skins.knife.golden_shear.desc: Shears made of pure gold, severing all bonds.
screen.sre.skins.knife.dagger.name: Dagger
screen.sre.skins.knife.dagger.desc: A short, sharp blade, perfect for close-quarters combat.
screen.sre.skins.knife.dart.name: Dart
screen.sre.skins.knife.dart.desc: A throwable weapon, striking distant enemies with precision.
screen.sre.skins.knife.diamond_knife.des: A brilliant blade from Farmer's Delight, born from the sparkling dreams deep in diamond mines—every slash shines like a diamond.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.default.name: Default
screen.sre.skins.revolver.default.desc: This is the original revolver skin without inscription or decoration, born from the sea of data untouched by dust; the so-called default appearance is the first true face that needs no words.
screen.sre.skins.knife.dragon_blade.name: Dragon Blade
screen.sre.skins.knife.dragon_blade.desc: A legendary dragon weapon, imbued with ancient power.
screen.sre.skins.knife.dusks_epitaph.des: When dusk falls, this blade will carve an epitaph for the world.
screen.sre.skins.knife.edge_knife.name: Edge Blade
screen.sre.skins.knife.edge_knife.desc: A blade slashed at the edge of the world, proof of existence.
screen.sre.skins.knife.ew_knife.name: Sarkaz Blade
screen.sre.skins.knife.ew_knife.desc: A Sarkaz creation, perfectly combining the coldness of machinery with the sharpness of a blade.
screen.sre.skins.knife.flaying_knife.des: A cruel torture tool, each stroke a blasphemy against life.
screen.sre.skins.knife.flesh_and_blood_r: Connected to the user's bloodline, the blade resonates with the heartbeat.
screen.sre.skins.knife.fly_cutter.name: Fly Cutter
screen.sre.skins.knife.fly_cutter.desc: A flying knife that never misses, from an assassin in the shadows.
screen.sre.skins.knife.fork.name: Fork
screen.sre.skins.knife.fork.desc: A tool from the dining table, also a weapon on the battlefield.
screen.sre.skins.knife.foxy_blade.name: Fox Tail
screen.sre.skins.knife.foxy_blade.desc: A blade gifted by foxes, every attack unpredictable.
screen.sre.skins.knife.gamma_doppler_cla: A rainbow-like claw blade, refracting deadly gamma rays.
screen.sre.skins.knife.harpy_star.name: Harpy Star
screen.sre.skins.knife.harpy_star.desc: A blessing from the sky, star power condensed into a blade.
screen.sre.skins.knife.herring_sword_fis: A herring nourished by ink, its snout the sharpest weapon.
screen.sre.skins.knife.ice_fish.name: Ice Fish
screen.sre.skins.knife.ice_fish.desc: A frozen life from Arctic waters, condensed into a crystalline blade.
screen.sre.skins.knife.icicle.name: Icicle
screen.sre.skins.knife.icicle.desc: An icicle hanging from a winter eaves, sharp and beautiful.
screen.sre.skins.knife.jolly_stick.name: Jolly Stick
screen.sre.skins.knife.jolly_stick.desc: A source of joy, bringing endless delight with every swing.
screen.sre.skins.knife.katar.name: Katar
screen.sre.skins.knife.katar.desc: A blade worn on the knuckles, every punch a fatal strike.
screen.sre.skins.knife.kunai.name: Kunai
screen.sre.skins.knife.kunai.desc: A classic ninja weapon, a killer's tool in the shadows.
screen.sre.skins.knife.light_sword.name: Light Sword
screen.sre.skins.knife.light_sword.desc: A blade formed from light, cutting through the darkness of dawn.
screen.sre.skins.knife.machete.name: Machete
screen.sre.skins.knife.machete.desc: An essential jungle tool, cutting through all obstacles.
screen.sre.skins.knife.makeshift.name: Makeshift Knife
screen.sre.skins.knife.makeshift.desc: A hastily assembled weapon, yet surprisingly powerful.
An ordinary-looking matchstick that can burn everything when lit.
screen.sre.skins.knife.missing_source.de: A blade of unknown origin, seemingly searching for something.
screen.sre.skins.knife.missing_sword.des: A lost memory, resurfacing on the blade.
screen.sre.skins.knife.nail.name: Nail
screen.sre.skins.knife.nail.desc: The simplest tool, yet the most reliable weapon.
screen.sre.skins.knife.neptune_knife.des: Poseidon's divine weapon, commanding the power of the sea.
screen.sre.skins.knife.ninja_claw.name: Ninja Claw
screen.sre.skins.knife.ninja_claw.desc: A ninja's claw, a deadly threat hidden in the shadows.
screen.sre.skins.knife.peach_stick.name: Peachwood Stick
screen.sre.skins.knife.peach_stick.desc: A Taoist ritual tool, made of peachwood to ward off evil.
screen.sre.skins.knife.pick.name: Screwdriver
screen.sre.skins.knife.pick.desc: A rotating blade for deconstructing all things, born from a craftsman's dream of spiraling obsession—seemingly ordinary, yet capable of twisting reality.
screen.sre.skins.knife.quenched_titanium: A titanium blade forged through countless trials, light yet sturdy.
screen.sre.skins.knife.rainbow_knife.des: A rainbow after rain, solidified into a dazzling blade.
screen.sre.skins.knife.real_sword.name: Real Sword
screen.sre.skins.knife.real_sword.desc: Not a fake imitation, but a true sword of swordsmanship.
screen.sre.skins.knife.roze.name: Rose Blade
screen.sre.skins.knife.roze.desc: A perfect fusion of rose and blade, beautiful yet lethally fragrant.
screen.sre.skins.knife.red_light_sword.d: A burning red light, like flames of fury.
Though small, it contains true power.
screen.sre.skins.knife.starlight.name: Starlight
screen.sre.skins.knife.starlight.desc: From distant galaxies, starlight condensed into a blade.
screen.sre.skins.knife.steel_claw.name: Steel Claw
screen.sre.skins.knife.steel_claw.desc: A claw forged from fine steel, tearing through all obstacles.
screen.sre.skins.knife.storm_blade.name: Storm Blade
screen.sre.skins.knife.storm_blade.desc: A divine weapon summoning thunder and storms, every strike shaking the world.
A versatile companion, ensuring survival even in the wilderness.
screen.sre.skins.knife.sweet_tooth.name: Candy Cane
screen.sre.skins.knife.sweet_tooth.desc: A sweet temptation, once tasted, impossible to resist.
screen.sre.skins.knife.sword_in_stone.de: A legendary sword embedded in stone, only the chosen hero can wield it.
screen.sre.skins.knife.tianjie_bit.name: Heavenly Tribulation Blade
screen.sre.skins.knife.tianjie_bit.desc: A divine blade obtained by those who survive the heavenly tribulation.
The origin of all things, condensed into this blade.
screen.sre.skins.knife.tianyuan_fairy.de: A messenger from the celestial realm, bestowing divine weapons upon mortals.
screen.sre.skins.knife.tenet.name: Tenet
screen.sre.skins.knife.tenet.desc: A firm conviction turned into a blade, fighting for ideals.
screen.sre.skins.knife.zenith_knife.name: Zenith Blade
screen.sre.skins.knife.zenith_knife.desc: Standing atop the world, overlooking all.
screen.sre.skins.knife.echoium_sword.des: A sword forged from echoium, emitting a pleasant resonance when swung.
screen.sre.skins.knife.sacrificial_dagge: A dagger used in ancient rituals, every engraving bearing ancestral faith.
screen.sre.skins.knife.unconscious_knife: A blade coated with a special hypnotic agent, inducing sleep in those it cuts.
screen.sre.skins.knife.giant_roasted_chi: A golden, crispy roasted chicken that looks delicious, but it hurts when used to hit.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.slime_redstone_: A combination of slime and redstone, exploding with sticky flames.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.anshidian.name: Andesite Electric
screen.sre.skins.revolver.anshidian.desc: A treasure from a mysterious weapon shop owner, said to have andesite fragments embedded in the gun.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.cannon.name: Cannon
screen.sre.skins.revolver.cannon.desc: An ancient heavy cannon, every shot earth-shattering.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.caplock_pistol: A masterpiece from the early firearm era, every shot an echo of history.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.coal_gun.name: Coal Gun
screen.sre.skins.revolver.coal_gun.desc: Burning coal as ammunition, a mix of black smoke and flames.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.colt_45.name: Colt 45
screen.sre.skins.revolver.colt_45.desc: A classic revolver, the iconic weapon of Western cowboys.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.carved_emperor: A royal hand-carved pistol, luxurious and dignified.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.desert_eagle.d: One of the most famous handguns, the powerful king of the desert.
A double-barreled gun, doubling the firepower.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.dragon_fractal: A marvel of geometry, a dragon-shaped fractal pattern covering the gun.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.european_long_: An ultra-long European-style revolver, elegant and unique.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.golden_gun.des: A handgun made of pure gold, luxurious and dangerous.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.habilis.name: Habilis
screen.sre.skins.revolver.habilis.desc: A weapon designed for skilled hands, precise and reliable.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.heavy_pistol.d: A heavy gun, the recoil of every shot thrilling.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.hummingbird.de: A weapon as light as a hummingbird, fast and precise.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.infinity.name: Infinity
screen.sre.skins.revolver.infinity.desc: A symbol of infinity—could the ammunition be endless as well?
screen.sre.skins.revolver.g18.name: Glock 18
screen.sre.skins.revolver.g18.desc: A classic Glock series, a rapid-firing weapon.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.izumo_41_style: A traditional firearm from the Izumo region of Japan, blending Eastern and Western designs.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.knife_gun.name: Knife Gun
screen.sre.skins.revolver.knife_gun.desc: A perfect combination of gun and knife, effective at both close and long range.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.lengcui.name: Cold Brew
screen.sre.skins.revolver.lengcui.desc: A weapon as refreshing as cold-brew coffee, calm and deadly.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.m3.name: M3
screen.sre.skins.revolver.m3.desc: A classic submachine gun, a firepower king on the battlefield.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.margas_flintlo: An ancient flintlock, each reload a ritual.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.minimalist_lin: A minimalist design, less is more.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.nail_gun.name: Nail Gun
screen.sre.skins.revolver.nail_gun.desc: A construction tool, its rapid steel nails deadly.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.pixel_gun.name: Pixel Gun
screen.sre.skins.revolver.pixel_gun.desc: A retro-style gun made of pixels, like from an 8-bit game world.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.potato_launche: A humorous weapon that launches potatoes, but don't underestimate its power.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.rust_lake.name: Rust Lake
screen.sre.skins.revolver.rust_lake.desc: Rust left by time on the gun, telling tales of years past.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.shengxuan_whit: A pure white gun body, holy and elegant.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.signal_gun.des: A distress signal gun, combining light and fire.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.sine_wave.name: Sine Wave
screen.sre.skins.revolver.sine_wave.desc: An elegant mathematical curve, a deadly power in its waves.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.soul_cairn.des: A cairn sealing souls, every bullet carrying the grudges of the dead.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.stick_gun.name: Stick Gun
screen.sre.skins.revolver.stick_gun.desc: Looks like a stick, but is a lethal weapon.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.time.name: Time
screen.sre.skins.revolver.time.desc: A weapon that controls time, deciding life and death in an instant.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.uzi.name: Uzi
screen.sre.skins.revolver.uzi.desc: A classic Israeli weapon, a rapid-firing deadly tool.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.water_gun.name: Water Gun
screen.sre.skins.revolver.water_gun.desc: A childhood toy, but this is a real gun.
A symbol of the Wild West, the cowboy spirit never dies.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.white_gun.name: Titanium Gun
screen.sre.skins.revolver.white_gun.desc: A pure white gun, innocence mixed with deadly intent.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.wood_gun.name: Wooden Gun
screen.sre.skins.revolver.wood_gun.desc: A gun made of wood, rustic and natural.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.woodcarving_pi: A finely carved pistol, a perfect blend of art and weapon.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.kekedi.name: Kekedi
screen.sre.skins.revolver.kekedi.desc: A cute-looking little gun, seemingly harmless but powerful.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.art_tyrant.des: A perfect fusion of art and violence, every shot a performance.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.burn_out_sulfu: The embers of burning sulfur, flames that never die.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.electrodynamic: The power of electromagnetism, lightning cutting through the sky.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.qianxia.name: Thousand Summers
screen.sre.skins.revolver.qianxia.desc: Summer blossoms, bursting into brilliant flames.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.pvz_peashooter: A pea shooter from Plants vs. Zombies, firing pea bullets.
screen.sre.skins.revolver.pvz_icemelon_g: An ice melon shooter from Plants vs. Zombies, firing freezing bullets.
screen.sre.skins.bat.default.name: Default
screen.sre.skins.bat.default.desc: This is the original bat skin without inscription or decoration, born from the sea of data untouched by dust; the so-called default appearance is the first true face that needs no words.
screen.sre.skins.bat.advanced_crowbar.de: A carefully improved crowbar, prying open any obstacle.
screen.sre.skins.bat.anvil.name: Anvil
screen.sre.skins.bat.anvil.desc: A blacksmith's core tool, each strike forging better weapons.
screen.sre.skins.bat.bamboo.name: Bamboo
screen.sre.skins.bat.bamboo.desc: A resilient Eastern wood, flexible yet powerful.
screen.sre.skins.bat.bamboo_bat.name: Bamboo Bat
screen.sre.skins.bat.bamboo_bat.desc: A bat made of bamboo, whistling with every swing.
screen.sre.skins.bat.baseball_bat.name: Baseball Bat
screen.sre.skins.bat.baseball_bat.desc: A classic home run weapon, a legend on the field.
screen.sre.skins.bat.battlesign.name: Battle Sign
screen.sre.skins.bat.battlesign.desc: A warrior's honor badge, a symbol of fighting for glory.
screen.sre.skins.bat.between_limits.name: Between Limits
screen.sre.skins.bat.between_limits.desc: A weapon that walks the edge of rules, unbound and free.
screen.sre.skins.bat.blood_bat.name: Bloody Bat
screen.sre.skins.bat.blood_bat.desc: A bat soaked in countless battles, exuding the scent of blood.
screen.sre.skins.bat.bread.name: Baguette
screen.sre.skins.bat.bread.desc: Looks like a baguette, but it's not soft when it hits.
screen.sre.skins.bat.composite_club.name: Composite Bat
screen.sre.skins.bat.composite_club.desc: A bat made of multiple materials, lightweight yet sturdy.
screen.sre.skins.bat.cylinder.name: Cylinder
screen.sre.skins.bat.cylinder.desc: An industrial-era product, simple and effective.
screen.sre.skins.bat.diamond_pickaxe.des: A sharp pickaxe that can mine any ore.
screen.sre.skins.bat.fried_legs.name: Fried Chicken Leg
screen.sre.skins.bat.fried_legs.desc: A mouthwatering fried chicken leg, but this delicacy can be lethal.
screen.sre.skins.bat.hammer.name: Hammer
screen.sre.skins.bat.hammer.desc: The most primitive weapon, simple and effective.
screen.sre.skins.bat.huaqiangbei.name: Huaqiangbei
screen.sre.skins.bat.huaqiangbei.desc: A legend of the electronics market, gathering technology and wisdom.
screen.sre.skins.bat.ice_bat.name: Ice Bat
screen.sre.skins.bat.ice_bat.desc: A bat made of frozen ice, every strike bringing chilling cold.
screen.sre.skins.bat.iron_hammer.name: Iron Hammer
screen.sre.skins.bat.iron_hammer.desc: A heavy hammer that can shatter rocks with one blow.
screen.sre.skins.bat.ore_pickaxe.name: Mining Pickaxe
screen.sre.skins.bat.ore_pickaxe.desc: A miner's trusty tool, every swing reaching for the treasures deep within the earth.
screen.sre.skins.bat.pipe.name: Pipe
screen.sre.skins.bat.pipe.desc: A sewer pipe, rough but practical.
screen.sre.skins.bat.plasma_axe.name: Plasma Axe
screen.sre.skins.bat.plasma_axe.desc: A product of futuristic technology, plasma energy cutting through anything.
screen.sre.skins.bat.red_axe.name: Red Axe
screen.sre.skins.bat.red_axe.desc: An axe blade as red as blood, inspiring fear.
screen.sre.skins.bat.road_roller.name: Road Roller
screen.sre.skins.bat.road_roller.desc: A heavy road roller, crushing everything.
screen.sre.skins.bat.sfa.name: S.F.A
screen.sre.skins.bat.slippers.name: Slippers
screen.sre.skins.bat.slippers.desc: The coziest, most homely weapon—slippers can still hit.
screen.sre.skins.bat.steel_tube.name: Steel Tube
screen.sre.skins.bat.steel_tube.desc: A common steel tube, a deadly weapon in battle.
screen.sre.skins.bat.wolfteeth_mace.name: Wolf-Toothed Mace
screen.sre.skins.bat.wolfteeth_mace.desc: A fearsome ancient battlefield weapon, its wolf-tooth spikes chilling.
screen.sre.skins.bat.wrench.name: Wrench
screen.sre.skins.bat.wrench.desc: A repair tool, also useful for 'repairing' someone's head.
screen.sre.skins.bat.guitar.name: Guitar
screen.sre.skins.bat.guitar.desc: The soul of rock, conquering the world with music.
screen.sre.skins.bat.pvz_newspaper.name: Newspaper
screen.sre.skins.bat.pvz_newspaper.desc: A torn newspaper, imbued with the power of rage.
screen.sre.skins.bat.pvz_tall_peanut.des: The hard shell of a tall nut, protecting your defense line.
screen.sre.skins.bat.pvz_wire_pole.name: Utility Pole
screen.sre.skins.bat.pvz_wire_pole.desc: A weapon made from a utility pole, delivering deadly electric strikes.
screen.sre.skins.bat.pvz_zombie_bat.name: Zombie Bat
screen.sre.skins.bat.pvz_zombie_bat.desc: A weapon wielded by giant zombies, exuding a rotten aura.
screen.sre.skins.bat.pvz_zombie_skin_bat: A street sign torn off by a giant zombie, eerie and deadly.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.default.name: Default
screen.sre.skins.grenade.default.desc: This is the original grenade skin without inscription or decoration, born from the sea of data untouched by dust; the so-called default appearance is the first true face that needs no words.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.big_bomb.name: Big Bomb
screen.sre.skins.grenade.big_bomb.desc: A massive explosive power, capable of destroying an entire building in one go.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.bottled_flame.d: Flames captured in a bottle, a piece of burning art.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.brown_substance: A mysterious brown substance that explodes on contact.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.coordinate_syst: A mathematical marvel, pinpointing the exact coordinates of an explosion.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.detonator.name: Detonator
screen.sre.skins.grenade.detonator.desc: The moment it's pressed, the gears of fate begin to turn.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.exponential_exp: An explosion whose power grows exponentially, a one-hit wonder.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.fire_charge.des: The most primitive explosive, igniting to create a massive impact.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.flying_knife_gr: A weapon combining a flying knife and a grenade, doubly deadly.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.fragmentation_g: A grenade that produces countless fragments upon explosion, devastating over a wide area.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.gas_cylinder.de: A high-pressure gas cylinder, its explosion terrifyingly powerful.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.king_ball.name: King's Ball
screen.sre.skins.grenade.king_ball.desc: A grenade bestowed by the king, representing supreme power.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.magnetic_bomb.d: A bomb that adheres to any surface, impossible to shake off.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.markov_chain.de: A probabilistic weapon, its explosion left to fate.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.mini_nuke.name: Mini Nuke
screen.sre.skins.grenade.mini_nuke.desc: A miniature nuclear weapon, containing world-shattering power in a small package.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.mobile.name: Mobile Phone
screen.sre.skins.grenade.mobile.desc: Looks like an ordinary phone, but it explodes without mercy.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.naval_mine.name: Naval Mine
screen.sre.skins.grenade.naval_mine.desc: An underwater mine, a silent and deadly threat.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.nugrenade.name: Nuclear Grenade
screen.sre.skins.grenade.nugrenade.desc: A grenade loaded with radioactive material.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.phone.name: A Certain Phone
screen.sre.skins.grenade.o_god_grenade.d: In the moment you pray to the OT God, the explosion descends upon the world.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.pisces.name: Pisces
screen.sre.skins.grenade.pisces.desc: The blessing of the zodiac, Pisces guarding the moment of explosion.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.rainbow_crepper: A creeper variant, exploding with rainbow-like brilliance.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.rocket.name: Rocket
screen.sre.skins.grenade.rocket.desc: A roaring rocket, cutting through the sky.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.scorpio.name: Scorpio
screen.sre.skins.grenade.scorpio.desc: The sting of Scorpio, deadly aftereffects of the explosion.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.shiguimian.name: Stone Mask
screen.sre.skins.grenade.shiguimian.desc: A mysterious stone mask, granting the power of vampires.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.submunition_min: A mine that produces smaller grenades after explosion, a chain-reaction nightmare.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.tnt.name: TNT
screen.sre.skins.grenade.lemon_grenade.d: A sour lemon, exploding with a fresh scent.
screen.sre.skins.grenade.null_grenade.de: A weapon from the void, devouring all upon explosion.
